## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`npm test`)
- [ ] Lint & format pass (`npm run lint && npm run format:check`)
- [ ] If a `utils/` public method changed: its `runs/<Class>/<method>.mjs` runner, `shell/`/`launch.json` entries, README, and `tests/<Class>.test.js` were regenerated/updated
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits
